# Arvind Advertizing

> India's leading printing and branding manufacturing company based in Delhi, specializing in UV printing, flex printing, sign boards, event branding, digital paper printing, and corporate branding.

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: +91-9810718141
- **Email**: arvind.advertizing@gmail.com
- **Address**: A1 22-A, Pusta Road, NH-709 Pillar No-157, Bhajanpura, Delhi-110053
- **Website**: https://www.arvindadvertizing.com

## Core Services

- **[UV Printing](https://www.arvindadvertizing.com/services/uv-printing)**: High-resolution printing on 40+ surfaces including acrylic, wood, glass, metal, PVC, and leather.
- **[Flex and Vinyl Printing](https://www.arvindadvertizing.com/services/flex-printing)**: Large-format outdoor banners, hoardings, self-adhesive vinyl, and one-way vision graphics.
- **[Sign Boards](https://www.arvindadvertizing.com/services/sign-boards)**: Custom LED glow sign boards, ACP cladding, 3D acrylic letters, SS cut-outs, and neon-flex signage.
- **[Event Branding](https://www.arvindadvertizing.com/services/event-branding)**: Turnkey event production, stage backdrops, exhibition booths, standees, and signage systems.
- **[Digital Paper Printing](https://www.arvindadvertizing.com/services/digital-paper-printing)**: High-quality offset and digital print for catalogues, brochures, visiting cards, and corporate stationery.
- **[Retail & Corporate Branding](https://www.arvindadvertizing.com/services/corporate-branding)**: Complete brand space rollouts, store fronts, murals, and wayfinding signage across India.

## Advanced Production Machinery
- **UV Flatbed (DOCAN H1000)**: Direct flatbed printing up to 1440 DPI.
- **UV Roll to Roll (Wit-Color)**: Wide roll-to-roll UV prints up to 10 ft width.
- **High-Speed Flex Printer (Starfire Gongzheng H & C Series)**: Fast wide-format banner printing at 234 sqm/hr.
- **HP Latex 570**: Eco-friendly, scratch-resistant premium latex printing.
- **MUTOH Eco-Solvent**: Photorealistic SAV & high-detail vinyl printing.
- **Konica Minolta Digital Press (PRESS C6100)**: Rapid offset-quality paper printing at 100 ppm.
- **CNC Plotter & Fabrication**: Precision routing, ACP grooving, MDF routing, SS cutting, and thermal lamination.
